data.title: RED: Write failing fixture test for ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh
data.description: Write behavioral fixture test in tests/scripts/test-ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh. Stub tracker with: 2 epics with PIL heading (1 in description, 1 in comment body event file), 1 epic without PIL. Assert: (1) migration exits 0, (2) 2 epics get brainstorm:complete tag added via ticket edit, (3) 1 UNMATCHED line printed to stdout, (4) marker file .claude/.brainstorm-tag-migration-v1 written. Also assert: (5) re-run exits 0 immediately with no tracker changes (marker file present), (6) plugin-source-repo guard exits 0 with a logged notice when invoked inside the plugin repo. Test must FAIL before implementation. testing_mode: RED
